questionHtml: Draw a plan diagram in the right-hand box with labels to show the distribution of tissues in this transverse section of a leaf.
markschemeHtml:
1.  palisade mesophyll;
  2.  spongy mesophyll;
  3.  lower epidermis;
  4.  upper epidermis;
  5.  xylem/phloem/vascular bundle;

1 mark for each correctly labelled tissue shown as a layer in proportion.

meta.title: Draw a plan diagram in the right-hand box with labels to show the distribution of tissues in this transverse section of a leaf.
